title: Shop integration
detail: Integrate Printful API for canvas prints and clothing. Stripe for payments. Product descriptions written in Matthew's voice.

title: Settings page
detail: Currently a placeholder. Build out actual settings — theme preferences, notification opt-ins, or reader preferences.

title: Photography gallery
detail: A dedicated gallery page showcasing Matthew's photography. Minimal layout, full-bleed images, no clutter.

title: User Settings Page with Switchable Theme
detail: Build a light/dark theme toggle on the settings page. Dark mode: White Bronze logos, background #333F50, nav border #193343, heading text #E5CBBB, paragraph text white. Light mode: Grey Bronze logos, background #F9F6F5, nav border #E5CBBB, heading text #193343, paragraph text #333F50. Nav bar has a subtle upward fade (dark grey in light mode, light grey in dark mode). Menu colours switch with theme but use muted tones. The development page is unaffected.

title: Setting Navigation and Font Size
detail: I would like to make a change to the navigation menu. There is currently a triabgle on the left hand side of the navigation function. Can we change this is a circle please. I want it to open the setting menu. We can remove the setting link from the menu window as the circle will be the primary method of opening the settings menu. The second change will be to add a slider to the seeting page under our theme selector. I would like to have three setting on the slider menu that will change the font of the paragragh text on the blog posts. Normal will be the current size, then large will be plus 50% and extra large will be plus 100% in size. This theme will only apply to blog posts. The development page font sizes will remain unchanged.

title: Table changes on Development Page
detail: I would liek to change the lay out of the tabel on the development page. for the development log i want to move the DETAIL section under the preceeding information. We have four titles DATE, COMMIT, TITLE and DETAIL. Lets change the width of DATE to 25%, COMMIT to       25% and TITLE to 50%. Then move the DETAIL to the next row and have it 100% of the width of the screen. Then for the future pipelines, i    want to follow the same theme for both planned and completed items. ID, STATE and TITLE to sapce the width. 25% 25% and 50% witht he   Prompt moving to the next row so it can use the full width of the screen. Things were feeling to cramped.

title: Blog Post Intention Menu Updates
detail: We have a Morning Intensions page you can navigation to from the menu. I would like to add a lin to the top of this page. I want it to navigate to the admin page where we can add a new blog post. Can you add this to the top of the page please? I would liek it to constrant agains the current theme. If the user has light mode selected, make this link to the admin area in a dark mode theme and vise-versa. It should be a stand alone button that navigates to the admin page.

title: Menu update
detail: As part of the menu update i want to a link to a settlings page. We need to bring hte text more to the left hand side to. At the moment it is a bit too centered. We should loose the go home link and put two small icons near the bottom of the menu window. on the left i want our Wolfman logo. One hte right i want the claude code icon. The wolfman logo will link to the hom page, claude code icon will link to the development page.

title: Integration of Admin Page to Website Theme
detail: I would like to intergration the the admin page int the them of the website. When you click to add a new blog post, the admin page is currently a stark white background with black text. I would like to change this to match the theme of the website. If the user has light mode selected, make the admin page in a dark mode theme and vise-versa. The admin page should have the same nav bar as the rest of the website and the same font. The only difference will be that it is inveresed in terms of light and dark mode. I would like a link aft the github token field that links to the https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens in case i need a new token. When the category of Morning Intension is selected, I want the operation to create a new page to scane for three different sections. If it find 'Todays's Intension' Then place this text under a heading calleed Todays's Intension. Then look for 'I'm grateful for' if it find it put it under a head of this name. Then finally, 'Something im great at' can go under the last heading. I might have spelt these headings wrong sometimes, in which case just place the text in as it reads.
